comment: Upstream pins for the LTP conformance lane. The fixture builder
refuses to build or verify against any other version, and every
recorded baseline embeds these values so a pin bump forces an
explicit baseline re-record. Busybox is resolved at build time
(LTP_BUSYBOX, then the checked-in fixture tree, then the Debian
busybox-static download) and its digest is recorded in the
generated fixture metadata instead of here.
license_boundary: The downloaded LTP and kirk trees and the generated rootfs are external GPL-covered fixtures. They stay under externals/test-fixtures/, are ignored by Git, and must not be committed or distributed without a license and source-offer review.
